headline: TXNM, Blackstone extend $11.5 billion sale deadline after regulatory setback
summary: TXNM Energy Inc. and the private equity firm looking to buy it said Friday that they extended the terms of their merger agreement, a sign of confidence in the proposed $11.5 billion deal just two weeks after it faced a major regulatory setback. That rebuke came in the form of a 2-1 vote by the state Public Regulation Commission earlier this month, when regulators ordered TXNM and Blackstone ...
